productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women's Tight Fresh Black Track Pant
description: Compositionadidas Supernova long tights made of a stretchable polyester fabric, has a soft and broad elasticated waist, engineered with Formotion and ClimaCool technology, loops at the hems to insert the feet, additional mesh inserts and reflective details, miCoach compatible and embroidered logo on the left footFittingSlimWash careHand wash or machine washDesigned for that absolute comfort during work outs, these tights from adidas are created using materials that ensure you have a fresh and comfortable feel all through. Engineered using a soft, stretchable polyester fabric, the tights stay snug and comfortably on the body. The Formotion technology employed offers superior Fit and comfort, allowing the body to move naturally. Well ventilated, the ClimaCool allows you to stay dry and fresh all through the wear, while the embroidered brand logo adds to the tights a sense of style. These tights come with foot loops that snugly fit around the inner arch of the foot, providing a snug and comfortable fit at the gym and during yoga sessions. There are reflective details that ensure visibility even in low light conditions, while its miCoach compatibility factor allows you to make use of the revbolutionary new digital and running analysis system. If you wish to go casual, simply pair it with lifestyle shoes and a long, stylish top.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
